subcodes.title: Ziyarat for the sixth to be martyred among the Letters of the Living
subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Lord my God! Thou art, verily, the Creator of the heavens and earth, the Knower of the seen and the unseen. Ever hast Thou been exalted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الامنع الاقدس. سبحانک اللهم یا الهی انک انت فاطر السموات و الارض عالم الغیب و الشهادة لم تزل قد تعززت
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @God as immanent vs. transcendent reality, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @absolute freedom; independence of God, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha
